text.title: Gumroad Listing Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for a Gumroad listing config plus valid / invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.code: { "listing": { "product_id": "prompt-pack-v3", "cover_url": "https://gumroad.com/u/cover.png", "cover_width_px": 1600, "cover_height_px": 900, "subtitle": "200 copy-paste prompts for solo founders — production-tested, MIT-licensed.", "price": {"mode": "fixed", "amount_usd": 19}, "product_type": "file", "refund_policy": "14_day", "tags": ["prompts", "indie", "ai", "templates"], "uses_mor": true, "license_api_enabled": false }, "affiliate": {"enabled": true, "commission_pct": 40, "payout_cadence": "monthly"}, "review": {"reviewed_at": "2026-05-23", "conversion_rate": 0.038, "refund_rate": 0.012, "rank_30d_revenue": 2} }

example.note: product_id too short, missing cover_url, subtitle too short, tags empty (below minItems 1), missing required listing fields, commission_pct above max 90, review missing required fields.

forbidden.pattern: listing.uses_mor=true AND seller also issues a separate VAT invoice for the same transaction (double-tax).
product_type=license AND license_api_enabled=false (key hard-coded in download bundle).
affiliate.commission_pct outside the [30, 50] indie band without an explicit rationale field.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Truncate subtitle at sentence boundary if exceeding 280 chars.
